data.title: Commodity and Stock Overweight Levels Reach New Highs, According to Bank of America Survey
data.description: A recent survey by Bank of America reveals that fund managers have increased their overweight positions in commodities and stocks to levels not seen since May 2022 and December 2024, respectively. According to Jin10, the survey also indicates that the cash allocation ratio has risen to 3.4%. This shift in asset allocation reflects changing market dynamics and investor sentiment as fund managers adjust their portfolios in response to current economic conditions.

data.title: Investor Concerns Rise as Corporate Profit Expectations Peak
data.description: Corporate profit expectations have reached their highest level since August 2021, according to Jin10. However, investors express concerns over what they perceive as excessive investment by companies at a record pace. This sentiment reflects a growing unease in the market as businesses continue to allocate resources aggressively, potentially impacting future financial stability. The survey highlights a dichotomy between optimistic profit forecasts and apprehensions about investment strategies, underscoring the complex dynamics currently influencing the economic landscape.

data.title: PRECIOUS METALS | AI Bubble Tops Tail Risk Concerns in February Fund Manager Survey
data.description: A recent survey conducted by Bank of America in February highlights key concerns among fund managers, with the artificial intelligence bubble identified as the primary tail risk. According to Jin10, the survey also reveals that investing in gold is considered the most crowded trade, while private credit is seen as the most likely trigger for a credit event. The findings underscore the growing apprehension in the financial sector regarding AI's impact and the potential for disruptions in credit markets.

data.title: Adani Group to Invest $100 Billion in Data Centers by 2035
data.description: Adani Group has announced plans to invest $100 billion by 2035 in the development of data centers. Bloomberg posted on X, highlighting that this move is part of billionaire Gautam Adani's strategy to leverage India's growing status as a hub for artificial intelligence. The investment aims to bolster the country's digital infrastructure, aligning with the increasing demand for data processing and storage capabilities. This initiative reflects Adani's commitment to advancing technological growth and supporting India's digital economy.

data.title: OpenSea will announce its product progress and development direction via online livestream on March 30.
data.description: OpenSea has announced a live online event on March 30th, where it will announce the latest product developments and future direction, stating that the event will mark the beginning of OpenSea's "next chapter." Regarding community speculation about the TGE timeline, OpenSea CMO Adam Hollander stated on Discord that the situation has remained unchanged since the last official statement and that no further information can be disclosed at this time.

data.title: UK Unemployment Reaches Five-Year High as Wage Growth Slows
data.description: The United Kingdom's unemployment rate has climbed to its highest level in nearly five years, signaling a continued weakening in the labor market. Bloomberg posted on X that this rise in unemployment is accompanied by a slowdown in wage growth, further highlighting the challenges facing the UK economy. The latest figures suggest that the labor market is under pressure, with fewer job opportunities and reduced wage increases impacting workers across the country. Economists are closely monitoring these developments as they assess the broader implications for the UK's economic recovery.

data.title: Anthropic and Infosys Collaborate on AI Solutions for Various Sectors
data.description: Anthropic has announced a partnership with Indian technology company Infosys to create advanced artificial intelligence solutions for businesses in sectors such as telecommunications and financial services. Bloomberg posted on X, highlighting the collaboration's potential to enhance AI capabilities across different industries. This partnership aims to leverage the strengths of both companies to deliver innovative AI-driven solutions, addressing the growing demand for advanced technology in various sectors.

data.title: Pi Coin Rises Amid Bitcoin Surge, Analysts Warn of Potential Correction
data.description: Pi Coin has seen a significant increase, climbing 23.8% over the past week, largely influenced by Bitcoin's surge over the weekend. According to NS3.AI, despite this upward movement, the broader cryptocurrency market continues to exhibit weakness, characterized by bearish sentiment and risk aversion among investors. Analysts have forecasted that Pi Coin might undergo a substantial correction, with predictions suggesting a potential drop of approximately 30% to $0.12 in the coming days.

data.title: Crypto Funds Bleed $173M As Outflows Extend To Fourth Week – Report
data.description:
Crypto exchange-traded products (ETPs) have extended their negative streak to a fourth consecutive week after US market weakness pushed global funds to over $170 million in weekly outflows. Related Reading: Bitcoin Should Be Flying—Instead, Quantum Risk Keeps It Grounded: Analyst Crypto Funds Outflows Extend Amid US Weakness According to the latest CoinShares data, crypto-based investment products recorded their fourth week of outflows amid the negative market sentiment of the past month. In a Monday report, James Butterfill, head of research at CoinShares, shared that global crypto funds closed the week with negative net flows totaling $173 million, bringing cumulative four-week outflows to $3. 47 billion
source: https://www.newsbtc.com/news/crypto-funds-bleed-173m-as-outflows-extend-to-fourth-week-report/

data.title: Lighter Adjusts Liquidity Infrastructure for Enhanced Market Support
data.description: On February 17, decentralized perpetual contract platform Lighter announced adjustments to its liquidity provider (LLP) infrastructure. According to BlockBeats, the platform has introduced independent LLP strategies for various market types, including real-world assets (RWA). These strategies will manage risk, liquidation, and ADL at the strategic level to enable LLPs to offer increased liquidity for newly launched markets.

data.title: OpenSea to Host Online Event Unveiling Future Developments
data.description:
OpenSea announced plans to hold an online live event on March 30 to reveal its latest product developments and future direction. According to BlockBeats, this event is set to mark the beginning of a new chapter for OpenSea.

In response to community speculation about the TGE timing, OpenSea's CMO Adam Hollander stated on Discord that there have been no changes since the last official update, and further information cannot be disclosed at this time.

data.title: Market news: The Dark Side of the Moon is seeking a $10 billion valuation in its latest funding round.
data.description: According to reports, in a funding round already invested in by Alibaba (09988.HK) and Tencent Holdings (00700.HK), artificial intelligence startup Dark Side of the Moon is seeking to raise its valuation to $10 billion, hoping to capitalize on strong investor interest in Chinese AI model startups. Sources familiar with the matter revealed that the company, which develops the Kimi chatbot, initiated new funding talks in late January to meet investor demand. Just about a month prior, the company completed a $500 million funding round at a valuation of $4.3 billion. Sources also stated that existing investors, including Alibaba, Tencent, and 5Y Capital, have committed over $700 million in the first tranche of this latest funding round. (Jinshi)

data.title: GEOPOLITICS | Macron Intensifies Efforts to Secure Fighter Jet Deal with India
data.description:
French President Emmanuel Macron is making significant efforts to win over Indian Prime Minister Narendra Modi in a bid to secure a deal for French fighter jets. Bloomberg posted on X, highlighting Macron's strategic move to strengthen defense ties with India. The French leader is keen on expanding military cooperation, aiming to enhance bilateral relations between the two nations.

Macron's approach includes diplomatic engagements and discussions focused on defense collaboration. The potential agreement is seen as a crucial step in bolstering France's defense industry and its global influence. The French government is optimistic about the prospects of this deal, which could significantly impact the defense landscape.

India, under Modi's leadership, is exploring options to modernize its military capabilities, making the French offer particularly appealing. The discussions are part of a broader strategy to deepen economic and strategic partnerships between France and India.

The outcome of these negotiations could have far-reaching implications for both countries, potentially reshaping defense alliances and economic ties. As Macron continues his diplomatic efforts, the international community is closely monitoring the developments in this high-stakes negotiation.

data.title: Polygon Surpasses Ethereum in Daily Transaction Fees Amid Polymarket Activity
data.description:
Polygon has recently outpaced Ethereum in daily transaction fees, driven by increased user engagement on the prediction market platform, Polymarket. According to Cointelegraph, data from Token Terminal revealed that on Friday, Polygon accumulated $407,100 in transaction fees, surpassing Ethereum's $211,700. This marks the first instance where Polygon has exceeded Ethereum in daily transaction fees.

The disparity in fees has since decreased, with Polygon recording $303,000 in daily transaction fees on Saturday, while Ethereum's fees were approximately $285,000. Polymarket, a significant player in the blockchain prediction market since its 2020 launch, is hosted on Polygon. Matthias Seidl, co-founder of Ethereum analytics platform growthepie, noted in an X post on Monday that Polymarket's activity has been a major contributor to Polygon's recent growth. Seidl highlighted that Polymarket generated over $1 million in fees on Polygon over the past week, with Origin World being the second-highest app on the platform, contributing around $130,000.

Polygon has also emphasized the increased activity on Polymarket. In an X post on Saturday, the team reported that wagers exceeding $15 million were placed on a single Oscars market category, underscoring Polygon's role as the underlying blockchain. Additionally, Polygon has deployed a network of trustless agents on the L2 to capitalize on opportunities within the prediction market. The popularity of prediction markets has surged since the last U.S. election, prompting several crypto firms to introduce their own platforms.

In related developments, there has been a notable rise in stablecoin usage on Polygon, particularly with Circle's USDC. On Sunday, Polygon data analyst @petertherock shared in an X post that the network achieved a new weekly high of 28 million USDC transactions. Polymarket utilizes Polygon-based USDC for trading on its platform, further contributing to the network's growing transaction volume.

data.title: Chinese AI Startup Moonshot AI Aims for $100 Billion Valuation in New Funding Round
data.description: Moonshot AI, a Chinese artificial intelligence startup recognized for its Kimi chatbot, is aiming to double its valuation to $100 billion through a new funding round. According to NS3.AI, this follows a recent $500 million raise at a $43 billion valuation. Major investors, including Alibaba, Tencent, and 5Y Capital, have already committed over $700 million in the initial tranche. This development highlights strong investor enthusiasm for Chinese AI model companies and their growth potential.

data.title: GEOPOLITICS | Impact of Conflict on Russian Border Regions
data.description: The ongoing conflict, which the Kremlin has portrayed as remote from the daily lives of ordinary Russians, is increasingly affecting border regions like Belgorod. Bloomberg posted on X, highlighting how the front line has moved closer to these areas, bringing the realities of war to the forefront for local residents. The situation in Belgorod exemplifies the growing proximity of the conflict to Russian territories, challenging the narrative of its distance from everyday life. As tensions continue, the impact on these regions becomes more pronounced, altering the perception of safety and normalcy for those living near the border.
